Package org.eventb.core.sc

Class SCFilterModule

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.Module
org.eventb.core.sc.SCModule
org.eventb.core.sc.SCFilterModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMarkerDisplay, ISCFilterModule, IFilterModule, IModule
Direct Known Subclasses:
FormulaFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventConvergenceModule, MachineEventExtendedModule, MachineEventRefinesModule, MachinePreviousEventLabelModule, MachineVariableFromParameterModule, TheoremModule
public abstract class SCFilterModule extends SCModule implements ISCFilterModule
Default implementation of a static checker filter module.

The two methods getFilterModules() and getProcessorModules() throw an UnsupportedOperationException. Filter modules cannot have child modules.

Since:
1.0
